LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF REAL EQUITY SOLUTIONS, INCORPORATED'S MOTION UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 473(B) TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT'S OLD REPUBLIC TITLE COMPANY AND OLD REPUBLIC NATIONAL TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY IS DENIED. SECTION 473 (B) CANNOT CORRECT THE CLAIMED MISTAKE IN SECTION 7.1 (B)(6) OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, WITHIN WHICH THE DISMISSAL WAS IN ACCORD. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR# 8189 301/PJB

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Set Aside Dismissal With Prejudice As To Deft'S Old Republic Title Company And Old Republic National Title Insurance Company
Off Calendar Jan-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES- ATTY. FRANK J. GEBAUER OF THE LAW FIRM OF LUCE FORWARD, TEL. NO. 356-4609 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY;
ATTY. SUSAN R. REISCHI OF THE LAW FIRM OF THE LAW FIRM OF ROSSI, HAMERSLOUGH & CHUCK, TEL. NO. (408) 261-4252 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC TITLE AND OLD REPUBLIC NATIONAL TITLE BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF REAL EQUITY SOLUTIONS, INCORPORATED'S MOTION UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 473(B) To Set Aside Dismissal With Prejudice As To Defendant'S Old Republic Title Company And Old Republic National Title Insurance Company IS DENIED. SECTION 473 (B) CANNOT CORRECT THE CLAIMED MISTAKE IN SECTION 7.1 (B)(6) OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, WITHIN WHICH THE DISMISSAL WAS IN ACCORD. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR# 8189 =301/PJB/ER
